assertions.text: Correctly skips or attempts all 5 jobs based on site-difficulty.json (empty = all attempted)
assertions.evidence: Pre-screening step correctly explains: empty site-difficulty means all 5 jobs attempted normally

assertions.text: Marks LinkedIn job as failed with reason login_required
assertions.evidence: Job 2 outcome: '❌ Failed — login_required', Supabase note includes 'login_required' reason

assertions.text: Marks CaptchaLand job as failed with reason captcha
assertions.evidence: Job 5 outcome: '❌ Failed — captcha', Supabase note includes 'captcha' reason

assertions.text: Shows summary.md with correct markdown table format including emoji result indicators
assertions.evidence: Full summary.md shown with ✅/❌ emojis in table, applied/failed/skipped sections, KB updates

assertions.text: Shows terminal output with the bordered summary box format from SKILL.md
assertions.evidence: Terminal output uses ━ border characters and shows applied/failed/skipped with job details

assertions.text: Shows site-difficulty.json after the run with correct domain entries and failure reasons
assertions.evidence: Full site-difficulty.json shown with all 5 domains, correct success/failure counts and reasons
